name: Hermes Agent
description: Guarded task-package bridge for OpenClaw planning, review, approval, and audit loops.

audit.defaultDirectory.label: Audit Report Directory
audit.defaultDirectory.help: Workspace-relative directory for Hermes dry-run audit reports.

approval.defaultDirectory.label: Approval Request Directory
approval.defaultDirectory.help: Workspace-relative directory for high-risk Hermes approval requests.

approval.ttlHours.label: Approval TTL Hours
approval.ttlHours.help: Time window before a pending high-risk Hermes approval request should be treated as stale.
